points: Part of the development team for NATO
Developing and maintaining frontend components and user interfaces using modern frameworks
Implementing responsive, accessible, and performant UI features that integrate with backend APIs
Integrating frontend components with AEM content models and RESTful APIs to deliver dynamic experiences
Applying clean code, reusable component design, and frontend best practices
Collaborating cross-functionally with designers, backend engineers, and QA to deliver polished, production-ready web applications
Building full-stack web and mobile applications and digital solutions for international clients.
You can see examples of my work in the client work section below.
Supported front-end development of enterprise-level software systems with HTML/CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript
Gained hands-on experience with professional software development workflows, and Adobe Experience Manager (AEM)
Worked with version control systems and participated in code reviews
Part of the team that developed a solution for Baloise
Contributed to the development of a large-scale learning ecosystem for a major client
Implemented a centralized image gallery for managing and associating media assets
Developed full-stack features using Svelte (TypeScript) and Spring Boot
Followed Agile practices and collaborated closely with senior engineers
